is of derived importance from those 4 propositions. Except a personal one: 5) YHWH intervened on my behalf in time of need, demonstrating divine providence. He saved my life. 6) YHWH is not spacially distinct from the world (universe). 7) "He has been transplanted + is alive." He enters his own epiphenomenal world + is not recognized. {Note} Nonetheless he -by entering it- replaces the epiphenomenal with his own absolute ontology, in camouflaged form. If the epiphen

Thus my acosmism of decades -of my whole life- comes to an end in an understanding at last not just of the nature of reality but of God, the two being linked through the basic nature of God (previously unknown to me) of "He who causes to exist whatsoever exists." The 2-3-74 apotheosis was an experience not accompanied by understanding on my part; now 5 1/2 years later understanding begins to come. This is perhaps an even higher moment than 3-74 because for the first

This leads me into a whole new relationship to reality (Sein). I see an issue far more important than what is good - The issue is, what is real? It is what it has always been for me: an epistemological (not moral or aesthetic) issue. Real (being - Sein) only insofar as it receives being from YHWH or is YHWH 4) YHWH to Belial to universe? Then YHWH directly to the universe?

The BIP + PTG must be sine wave pulsation: {Illustration of sine wave oscillating between BIP and PTG} Our dream world auto-produced. Risk. Shrinking from risk - hence retractile from knowing. Unity of opposites BIP + PTG. High stakes. To try for PTG you risk BIP. Could go either way. Retreat from epistemological risk. Too dangerous. Heaven and hell; Purgatorio as compromise for the faint hearted - not so much war as gamble. Like turning up the next card. Eagles: "It

the dream quality of the dream - i.e. world. So 1) Rasp that is from outside + can't be fitted in. 2) Dream world. Disclosed. 3) Memory (anamnesis). 4) Loss of occlusion. See different reality. 5) Restoration of true personality. 6) Set/ground. 7) Valis distinguished.

It all starts with the rasp as in "VR." If the autograph is genuine it is not from -a part of- this (i.e. dream) world. If it is a fake it is part of this (fake?) world: Either it comes in from outside (a rasp?) or it doesn't. Dok

True beauty is an aspect of the real + the real only. Modern art knows this. + the reason why is because Sein (the real) = YHWH. That is why, + "VR" says so. If you ask why a real brick is more beautiful than the most ethereal dream. It is because deus sive substantia. If it is real it is YHWH. If it is not real it is not YHWH. So the real is the via ad deum. It (the real) is not the artifact -made by- of God but is God. The Roogna letter was dysyntonic: it "could no

deepest level; I was terror-stricken: either I believed in YHWH or there was das Nichts. Not the salvation of my individual soul +/or immortality was at stake but what I call "the existence of existence." I -in 3-74- was given an example of the role of Valis working at a level deeper than that of saving one man (me) or all men; rather, the guarantor of substantia as such: all substantia as a single totality. + when I saw Valis -+ was communicated to by Valis- I saw him, the high priest presiding at this eucharist. The epiphenomenal universe became him, body + blood: the cosmic Christ. In "TDHG" it is evident that I am desperately trying to find a center (omphalos) for/to my life, but that I was failing; I was still "stateless." Now the wisdom of my recent moves is evident: living here, buying my apartment - leaving Tess, staying friends with Doris. In contrast to "TDHG"

It's "I am" vs Diana's magic -- what I saw through the 1:.618034 door! Masc vs feminine; the AI voice & Christ are female (Shekhina).

2 sides of God? Solar? Lunar?

Of the two I prefer the Kingdom -- But: what if, to be in it, you have to be enchanted? If it's bipolarized to sein, do I still prefer it?

The secret known by the early Xtians : how to induce the secretion of a Mescalin-like auto-toxin, which I did, probably due mainly to stress & fear & awareness of imminent death -- plus the pent
